title: [Bite Sized Mods] Diamond Ingots
description: Have you ever felt like there just weren't enough Diamond Ingots in the game?)
body:
Have you ever felt like there just weren't enough Diamond Ingots in the game? 
-
***
Well, feel no more! In this 5-star mod, I've worked for at least an hour to bring you the latest in Diamond Ingot-type technology! To get started, Install this mod and simply chuck a diamond in a furnace and you're good to go!

 

Features Include:

* Diamond Ingots.
*Armour and Tools, i guess.
*Diamond Ingots are slightly better than normal Diamonds, making them the perfect upgrade for anyone terrified of the nether!
*11 Kb, whatever that means.
 

That's it.


Have a great day! :)
